MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold Walter Evje for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, who is present.
Allegra A. Jones, Limited Scope Attorney for Defendant Kevin Reynolds, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the signed judgment pursuant to stipulation for premises located at 405 Valencia Street, #315, San Francisco, CA. See scanned document. The trial date of 6/29/09 is vacated.
